Settings & security

Manage your profile, sign-in details, and protect your account.

Full Name

Member since 2026

Profile details

Your name and contact details across the platform.

Email address

You'll use this to sign in. Changing it requires your password.

Password

Use a strong, unique password you don't use elsewhere.

Two-factor authentication

Protect your account with a 6-digit code from Google Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP app.

Status: Enabled Your account requires an authenticator code at every sign-in.
Status: Not enabled Recommended for admins, tour operators, and collectors with active orders.

Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.

Manual key: SECRET

  • Never share your password or one-time codes.
  • We will never email asking for your password.
  • Sign out on shared devices.
